title: Ship Permission Presets
description: Schema for .ship/permissions.jsonc — named permission presets referenced by agent configs via permissions.preset. Keys are preset names (e.g. ship-standard, ship-autonomous, or any custom name).

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocompletion.

ToolPattern.description: A tool permission pattern. Syntax: bare tool name (Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, Bash, WebFetch), parameterized tool with glob argument (Bash(git *), Bash(rm -rf *), Bash(npm *)), MCP tool (mcp__<server>__<tool>, e.g. mcp__ship__create_job), or wildcard (mcp__*__delete*, Bash(*)).

PermissionPreset.description: A named permission preset defining tool access rules.

default_mode.description: Default permission mode. plan: read-only. default: ask for writes. acceptEdits: auto-approve file edits. dontAsk: fully autonomous. bypassPermissions: no restrictions.

tools_allow.description: Tool patterns to allow without confirmation.

tools_deny.description: Tool patterns to deny. Takes precedence over tools_allow.

tools_ask.description: Tool patterns requiring user confirmation. Applied before tools_allow but after tools_deny.
